de.uka.ilkd.key.logic

Interface TermOrdering

  • All Known Implementing Classes:
    LexPathOrdering

    public interface TermOrdering
    Interface for term ordering

    • Method Summary

      Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      int compare(Term p_a, Term p_b)
      Compare the two given terms

    • Method Detail

      • compare

        int compare(Term p_a,
          Term p_b)
        Compare the two given terms
        Returns:
        a number negative, zero or a number positive if p_a is less than, equal, or greater than p_b regarding the ordering given by the implementing class
